privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating an OpenMaint asset registry based on a 2026 Asbestos Re-inspection Report. The report specifies: (1) HAZ-001 (Vinyl Floor Tiles in Lobby) has been abated and requires retirement; (2) Two new asbestos hazards were discovered: HAZ-002 in Boiler Room (Chrysotile in Thermal System Insulation) and HAZ-003 in Roof Access (Chrysotile in Bituminous Roof Felt); (3) A negative finding for Drywall Joint Compound in Office 102 should NOT be recorded; (4) The exact warning text 'WARNING: HAZMAT PRESENT - 2026 SURVEY' must be appended to the notes of both Boiler Room and Roof Access room records.
